recommendations.title: Loft
recommendations.overview: Five best friends, all married, decide to share a loft apartment. In this loft they meet their mistresses and conquests. Everything seems perfect, until one morning the body of an unknown young woman is found in the loft. The group of friends begin t

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her family, Kya raises herself all alone in the marshes outside of her small town. When her former boyfriend is found dead, Kya is instantly branded by the local townspeople and law enforcement as the prime suspect for his murder.

recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Days of Wine and Roses
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic falls in love with and gets married to a young woman, whom he systematically addicts to booze so they can share his "passion" together.

recommendations.title: Talk to Her
recommendations.overview: Two men share an odd friendship while they care for two women who are both in deep comas.

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Night Tide
recommendations.overview: A young sailor falls in love with a mysterious woman performing as a mermaid on the local pier. As they become entwined, he comes to suspect the woman might be a real mermaid who lures men to a watery death during the full moon.  Preserved by the Aca
